title: dipladenia velutina
intro: Dipladenia velutina, also known as the 'Red Trumpet' or 'Velvet Trumpet', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a climbing plant native to Brazil and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin irritations. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Dipladenia velutina is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
